title: Multi-Tenancy Data Model
body:
Description: Add Organization entity and organizationId FK on User, Patient, and MedicalNote; migrate existing records.
Acceptance Criteria:
- All three tables contain non-null organizationId
- Migration succeeds on fresh and existing DB
- Schema docs updated

title: Enforce Organization Scoping
body:
Description: Refactor services/repositories so all reads/writes are scoped by organizationId, not doctorId only.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Cross-org access returns 404 or 403
- Integration tests prove isolation for patients and notes

title: RBAC Roles and JWT Claims
body:
Description: Add roles DOCTOR, NURSE, ADMIN, ORG_OWNER; include role and organizationId in JWT.
Acceptance Criteria:
- New users get default role
- JWT contains role and org claims
- Auth middleware populates request context

title: Route Permission Middleware
body:
Description: Implement permission guards per endpoint using RBAC matrix.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Forbidden actions return 403
- Route tests cover role-path combinations

title: Patient Soft Delete
body:
Description: Replace hard delete with deletedAt or isDeleted and hide deleted patients by default.
Acceptance Criteria:
- DELETE /api/patients/:id does not remove row
- list/get exclude deleted unless explicitly requested

title: Patient Update Endpoint
body:
Description: Add PUT /api/patients/:id with validation and org/role checks.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Endpoint exists in router and OpenAPI
- Update succeeds for allowed roles
- Tests pass
depends_on: Route Permission Middleware; Enforce Organization Scoping

title: Patient Search Endpoint Enhancements
body:
Description: Extend GET /api/patients with search/filter params (q, phone, gender, age, date range) and indexed queries.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Filters validated
- Query performance acceptable
- Pagination metadata preserved
depends_on: Patient Soft Delete; Enforce Organization Scoping

title: Notes Update/Finalize Endpoint
body:
Description: Implement PUT /api/notes/:id for clinician edits and finalize flow.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Draft note can be edited and finalized
- Unauthorized roles blocked
- OpenAPI updated
depends_on: Route Permission Middleware; Enforce Organization Scoping

title: Organization Dashboard Endpoint
body:
Description: Implement GET /api/organization/dashboard with org-level summary stats.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Returns scoped aggregates (users/patients/notes/usage)
- Protected by RBAC
- Documented in OpenAPI
depends_on: Enforce Organization Scoping; RBAC Roles and JWT Claims

title: Structured Note Generation Contract
body:
Description: Change generation input to structured clinical fields and noteType (SOAP, PROGRESS, REFERRAL).
Acceptance Criteria:
- Validator rejects invalid payloads/types
- AI prompt builder uses structured fields
- Tests updated

title: Note Draft Lifecycle
body:
Description: Add note statuses (DRAFT, FINAL) so generated notes start as draft and finalize via update endpoint.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /notes/generate creates draft
- PUT /notes/:id finalizes
- Status transitions enforced
depends_on: Structured Note Generation Contract; Notes Update/Finalize Endpoint

title: Audit and Access Logging
body:
Description: Add AuditLog table and write logs for note edits/finalization and patient/note reads.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Entries include actor, org, action, resource, timestamp
- Read/update operations produce logs
depends_on: Note Draft Lifecycle; Enforce Organization Scoping

title: Global API Rate Limiting
body:
Description: Extend rate limiting to protected read/write endpoints with sensible per-route policies.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Excess calls return 429
- Limits configurable via env
- Integration tests for auth/patients/notes

title: Schema Hardening for Notes
body:
Description: Store structuredOutput as JSON instead of string and validate schema before persist.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Prisma type updated
- Migration works
- Invalid structures rejected

title: Subscription and Feature Gating
body:
Description: Add Subscription model and org-level usage gating for quotas/features.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Plan checks enforced in middleware
- Usage tracked per org
- Tests for plan limits
depends_on: Multi-Tenancy Data Model; Organization Dashboard Endpoint
